\tzpentry{ID6117}{Wavefunction Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID6117 introduces Wavefunction Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\tan\psi \propto \sqrt{1 - r_s/r}$
\]
